creator: anthropic.com

evidence.text: Warp is building an agentic development environment: a workbench for running, managing, and scaling agents. Grounded in an open-source terminal with over 60k GitHub stars, developers using Warp run coding agents like Claude Code and Warp Agent locally or in the cloud. Users can start agents from any surface via CLI, API, or SDK, and manage all agents in a central control plane. Warp defaults to Claude models for advanced coding and provides a modern environment for running Claude Code locally.
